---
title: "Bulk RNA-seq Explorer"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: zephyr
    orientation: columns
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/artblakey19/rnaseq-report-MMB
server: shiny
---

```{r}
#| context: setup
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(shiny)
  library(DT)
  library(plotly)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(yaml)
})

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

# Project root: defaults to CWD, overridable for containerised deployment.
project_root <- Sys.getenv("DASHBOARD_PROJECT_ROOT", "")
if (!nzchar(project_root)) {
  project_root <- normalizePath(getwd(), mustWork = TRUE)
}

cfg_path <- file.path(project_root, "config", "config.yaml")
cfg <- if (file.exists(cfg_path)) yaml::read_yaml(cfg_path) else list()

contrasts_path <- file.path(
  project_root,
  cfg$input$contrasts_tsv %||% "config/contrasts.tsv"
)

contrasts <- if (file.exists(contrasts_path)) {
  readr::read_tsv(contrasts_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  data.frame(contrast_id = character())
}

contrast_choices <- contrasts$contrast_id

prim_padj <- cfg$de$primary$padj    %||% 0.05
prim_lfc  <- cfg$de$primary$abs_lfc %||% 1
```

# {.sidebar}

```{r}
selectInput(
  "contrast", "Contrast",
  choices  = contrast_choices,
  selected = if (length(contrast_choices)) contrast_choices[1] else NULL
)
sliderInput("padj", "padj cutoff", min = 0.001, max = 0.5,
            value = prim_padj, step = 0.005)
sliderInput("lfc", "|LFC| cutoff", min = 0, max = 5,
            value = prim_lfc, step = 0.1)
hr()
helpText(sprintf("Project: %s", basename(project_root)))
helpText("Cutoffs apply live to volcano, MA, and the DE table — no recomputation, just re-classification of pre-computed DESeq2 results.")
```

# Differential expression

## Row {height=18%}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Up DEGs"
#| icon: arrow-up-circle
#| color: danger
list(value = textOutput("n_up", inline = TRUE))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Down DEGs"
#| icon: arrow-down-circle
#| color: primary
list(value = textOutput("n_down", inline = TRUE))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total tested"
#| icon: bar-chart
#| color: light
list(value = textOutput("n_total", inline = TRUE))
```

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "Volcano (apeglm-shrunken LFC)"
plotlyOutput("volcano")
```

```{r}
#| title: "MA"
plotlyOutput("ma")
```

# DE table

```{r}
DT::DTOutput("de_table")
```

```{r}
#| context: server

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

load_de <- function(cid) {
  p <- file.path(project_root, "results", "de", cid, "deseq2_results.csv")
  if (!file.exists(p)) return(NULL)
  readr::read_csv(p, show_col_types = FALSE)
}

de_reactive <- reactive({
  req(input$contrast)
  load_de(input$contrast)
})

filtered <- reactive({
  d <- de_reactive()
  req(d)
  d %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sig = !is.na(padj) & padj < input$padj & abs(log2FoldChange) >= input$lfc,
      direction = dplyr::case_when(
        sig & log2FoldChange > 0 ~ "up",
        sig & log2FoldChange < 0 ~ "down",
        TRUE                     ~ "ns"
      )
    )
})

output$n_up    <- renderText({ d <- filtered(); req(d); sum(d$direction == "up") })
output$n_down  <- renderText({ d <- filtered(); req(d); sum(d$direction == "down") })
output$n_total <- renderText({ d <- filtered(); req(d); nrow(d) })

output$volcano <- renderPlotly({
  d <- filtered(); req(d)
  d <- d %>% dplyr::mutate(neglog10p = -log10(pmax(pvalue, 1e-300)))

  p <- ggplot(d, aes(
        x = log2FoldChange, y = neglog10p, colour = direction,
        text = sprintf("%s | LFC=%.2f | padj=%.2g",
                       gene_name, log2FoldChange, padj))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.55, size = 1.1) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(up = "#c0392b", down = "#2c7bb6", ns = "grey70")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-input$lfc, input$lfc),
               linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(input$padj),
               linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
    labs(x = "log2FoldChange (apeglm)", y = "-log10(pvalue)", colour = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

  plotly::ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") %>%
    plotly::layout(margin = list(t = 30, b = 50, l = 60, r = 20))
})

output$ma <- renderPlotly({
  d <- filtered(); req(d)
  p <- ggplot(d, aes(
        x = log10(pmax(baseMean, 1)), y = log2FoldChange, colour = sig,
        text = sprintf("%s | LFC=%.2f | padj=%.2g",
                       gene_name, log2FoldChange, padj))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.1) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "#c0392b", `FALSE` = "grey60"),
                        labels = c(`TRUE` = "passes cutoff",
                                   `FALSE` = "ns")) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey40") +
    labs(x = "log10(baseMean)", y = "log2FoldChange (apeglm)", colour = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

  plotly::ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") %>%
    plotly::layout(margin = list(t = 30, b = 50, l = 60, r = 20))
})

output$de_table <- DT::renderDT({
  d <- filtered(); req(d)
  show_cols <- intersect(
    c("gene_id", "gene_name", "baseMean", "log2FoldChange",
      "lfcSE", "stat", "pvalue", "padj", "direction"),
    names(d)
  )
  d %>%
    dplyr::arrange(padj) %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(show_cols)) %>%
    DT::datatable(
      rownames   = FALSE,
      filter     = "top",
      extensions = "Buttons",
      options    = list(
        pageLength = 25,
        lengthMenu = c(10, 25, 50, 100, 250),
        dom        = "Blfrtip",
        buttons    = c("csv", "copy"),
        scrollX    = TRUE
      )
    ) %>%
    DT::formatSignif(
      intersect(c("baseMean", "log2FoldChange", "lfcSE", "stat", "pvalue", "padj"),
                show_cols),
      digits = 3
    )
})
```
